requirements.title: oracle-deriver recognizes interactive-mockup as a spec_shape
Structural tests assert the v2.1.0 framework is wired

reuse_decisions.anchor: skills/interactive-mockup-discovery/SKILL.md — distinct cross-cutting discipline; adding to existing skills would conflate concerns or bloat them
agents/interaction-observer.md — no existing agent has the headless-execution-and-simulate role; visual-capture screenshots, flow-executor runs Playwright flows; observer is structurally distinct
agents/oracle-deriver.md — adding a 6th spec_shape follows the established 5-shape pattern; minimal-correct extension
agents/interaction-intuiter.md — intuiter owns the per-element-with-ambiguity-question pattern; intent inference reuses the surface
hooks/vao_tools.py — 5 existing tools live in this module; 6th is same module-not-hook pattern
hooks/review_evidence_schema.py — new OPTIONAL field; v2.0.0 evidence files remain valid
Live headless Chrome wiring — contract documented in v2.1.0; runtime sub-script is v2.1.x
Multi-mockup oracle synthesis — same shape as v2.0.0's deferred multi-codebase oracle

front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — documentation + structural-test change. The PRODUCT gains stronger interactive-mockup discipline via the new skill + agent + tool + schema field, but the plugin's OWN test surface is pytest with stdlib-only verification of the contract.
